description: You are an e-commerce merchandising manager. Build a 'Product Catalog' report using products.csv and sales.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\. The report must feature a Matrix visual displaying Product_Name, the product Image, and the Product Page URL (formatted as a URL icon). The data model requires a relationship on Product_ID and a DAX measure named 'Total_Revenue' calculated as the sum of Quantity multiplied by Unit_Price. Ensure the Image_URL and Product_Page_URL columns are categorized as Image URL and Web URL respectively. Include a Sparkline in the Matrix showing the Total_Revenue trend over Date. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Product_Catalog.pbix.
